title: Reduce Beef Consumption
description: Replace beef meals with plant-based alternatives.

title: Green Commuting
description: Substitute personal gasoline car commutes with public transit, cycling, or walking.

title: Reduce Flying
description: Reduce flight frequency by substituting short-haul flights with rail travel or virtual meetings.

title: Install Smart Thermostat
description: Install a smart thermostat to optimize heating and cooling schedules.

title: Switch to LED Bulbs
description: Replace incandescent lightbulbs with high-efficiency LEDs.

title: Improve Home Insulation
description: Improve wall and attic insulation to reduce heating/cooling energy loss.

title: Switch to Renewable Electricity
description: Switch electricity provider to a 100% renewable/green energy tariff.

title: Reduce Discretionary Shopping
description: Limit non-essential clothing and electronics shopping.

title: Buy Second Hand First
description: Acquire pre-owned items instead of purchasing new manufactured goods.

title: Optimize Weekend Consumption
description: Reduce energy and leisure transport emissions spike on weekends.
